reasoning: Since I lack real-time search capabilities to verify the current status of the lawsuit as of October 2025, I rely on base rates. Civil lawsuits generally have a high settlement rate (over 80% overall), but resolving this within 2025 depends on the case's timeline. Assuming the suit was filed in late 2024 or early 2025, there is a roughly 35-40% chance it has already settled by the forecast cutoff (October 2025). If it hasn't settled yet, the likelihood of a settlement occurring in the final two months of 2025 is relatively low (~10%). Thus, the overall probability merges the likelihood of it having already settled with the likelihood of a near-term settlement, yielding an estimate around 45%.
